creator: bsdstats@nanoman.ca
text:
------=_20120110193257_66022
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset="iso-8859-1"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
 
 It looks like the patch I attached didn't go through for some reason, so
 let's try this again.  What an embarrassing way to begin maintainership!
 ------=_20120110193257_66022
 Content-Type: text/plain; name="Makefile.diff.txt"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit
 Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="Makefile.diff.txt"
 
 --- /usr/ports/sysutils/bsdstats/Makefile.old	2011-09-25 17:35:26.000000000 -0400
 +++ /usr/ports/sysutils/bsdstats/Makefile	2012-01-10 19:10:32.767071000 -0500
 @@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
  CATEGORIES=	sysutils
  DISTFILES=
  
 -MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 +MAINTAINER=	bsdstats@nanoman.ca
  COMMENT=	Monthly script for reporting anonymous statistics about your machine
  
  NO_BUILD=	yes
 ------=_20120110193257_66022--
